claims.summary: Near-gate entropy values may produce shimmer or an onset too subtle to feel stable.
claims.disposition: Verified exact gate, just-above-gate monotonicity, no-pop, and later-tail visibility tests around the named 0.85 boundary.

claims.summary: Reserved dimensions 44 through 47 must remain unchanged by tail vibrancy.
claims.disposition: Verified current codec regressions preserve those dimensions exactly.

claims.summary: Rising, falling, and hovering entropy should be compared to expose derivative-sensitive shimmer.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded replay over exact codec outputs and temporal trajectories with no live send or gain change.

claims.summary: Tail vibrancy should use a dynamic entropy-derivative gate or noise floor.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because derivative gating or noise injection changes live codec projection and transport behavior.
